title: Bitwarden adds support for passkey login on Windows 11
summary: Bitwarden announced support for logging into Windows 11 devices using passkeys stored in the manager's vault, enabling phishing-resistant authentication. [...]

title: Mail2Shell zero-click attack lets hackers hijack FreeScout mail servers
summary: A maximum severity vulnerability in the FreeScout helpdesk platform allows hackers to achieve remote code execution without any user interaction or authentication. [...]

title: Windows 10 KB5075039 update fixes broken Recovery Environment
summary: Microsoft has released the KB5075039 Windows Recovery Environment update for Windows 10 to fix a long-standing issue that prevented some users from accessing the Recovery environment. [...]

title: Fake LastPass support email threads try to steal vault passwords
summary: Password management software provider LastPass is warning users of a phishing campaign targeting its users with fake unauthorized account access alerts. [...]

title: Cisco warns of max severity Secure FMC flaws giving root access
summary: Cisco has released security updates to patch two maximum-severity vulnerabilities in its Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC) software. [...]

title: Spyware-grade Coruna iOS exploit kit now used in crypto theft attacks
summary: A previously undocumented set of 23 iOS exploits named "Coruna" has been deployed by multiple threat actors in targeted espionage campaigns and financially motivated attacks. [...]

title: Hacker mass-mails HungerRush extortion emails to restaurant patrons
summary: Customers of restaurants using the HungerRush point-of-sale (POS) platform say they received emails from a threat actor attempting to extort the company, warning that restaurant and customer data could be exposed if HungerRush fails to respond. [...]

title: FBI seizes LeakBase cybercrime forum, data of 142,000 members
summary: The FBI has seized the LeakBase cybercrime forum, a major online forum used by cybercriminals buy and sell hacking tools and stolen data. [...]

title: Europol-coordinated action disrupts Tycoon2FA phishing platform
summary: An international law enforcement operation coordinated by Europol has disrupted Tycoon2FA, a major phishing-as-a-service (PhaaS) platform linked to tens of millions of phishing messages each month. [...]

title: Mississippi medical center reopens clinics hit by ransomware attack
summary: The University of Mississippi Medical Center (UMMC) says it has resumed normal operations, nine days after a ransomware attack blocked access to electronic medical records and took down many of its IT systems. [...]

title: How a Brute Force Attack Unmasked a Ransomware Infrastructure Network
summary: A routine RDP brute-force alert led to unusual credential hunting and a geo-distributed VPN-linked infrastructure. Huntress Labs explains how one compromised login unraveled a suspected ransomware-as-a-service ecosystem tied to initial access brokers. [...]
